title: Dress-Up Center (No Cutting Required)
summary: A kids' dress-up storage unit built entirely from boards left at their full purchased length — a bottom shoe compartment, a closet rod for costumes, and a top shelf, no cuts required.
description:
Every board in this build is used at its full 48" purchased length — that's the entire point of the design, and it's what makes this such a fast, approachable build for anyone without a saw. Attach the bottom board to the two side boards first, which creates an enclosed compartment underneath for shoes and small accessories.

Attach the back board to the sides above the bottom compartment — this gives the top shelf a backstop so hats, crowns, and small items don't slide off behind it. **Optionally jigsaw a decorative cutout into the top of the side boards** if a more finished look is wanted, though the piece works fine without it.

Add the 1x2 trim to the top shelf and ends for extra rigidity and a finished look, then install the closet rod pockets and rod inside the upper cavity for hanging costumes. Finish with caster wheels on the bottom so kids can roll the whole thing around.

tools.note: Only needed for the optional decorative top cutout.

cutList.note: No cuts required — used at full purchased length.

steps.title: Build the bottom compartment
steps.body: Attach the bottom board to the two side boards to form the enclosed shoe-and-accessory compartment.

steps.title: Optional decorative cutout
steps.body: If wanted, use a jigsaw to cut a decorative shape into the top of the side boards.

steps.title: Attach the back
steps.body: Attach the back board to the sides above the bottom compartment, giving the top shelf a backstop.

steps.title: Add the shelves and trim
steps.body: Attach the top and lower shelves, then add the 1x2 trim to the top shelf and ends.

steps.title: Install the closet rod
steps.body: Attach the closet rod pockets inside the upper cavity and drop in the closet rod.

steps.title: Add the casters
steps.body: Attach the caster wheels to the bottom of the unit.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand and personalize the finished piece.

unresolvedImages.alt: Kids dress up center with closet rod and storage
